title: French Chicken Casserole
description: A flavorful keto French chicken casserole that's both healthy and delicious.
instructions: Cut the baguette into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the mushroom sauce to the skillet and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer and let cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked chicken and mushroom sauce mixture.
Stir in the softened cream cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese, garlic powder, salt, and pepper to the bowl and stir until combined.
Add the cubed baguette to the bowl and stir until the bread is evenly coated with the cheese mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and dot the top with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
